summary: Add Paracelsus: 4 Waite 1894 alchemical treatises to renaissance_hermeticism; fix sacred-texts UTF-8 encoding fallback

resolution.note: Added 4 Waite 1894 Paracelsus treatises (54 chunks) to renaissance_hermeticism; nav-stripped, embedded, retrieval-verified (tops 'alchemical tincture' query). Also fixed an intermittent UTF-8->Latin-1 mojibake bug in the sacred-texts downloader (charset-header fallback) surfaced by the /alc/ pages. validate_index + 275 tests pass.
